description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests - Jellyfish that runs on push to epic/* branches and on pull requests to master and epic/* branches. Use an ubuntu-latest job that checks out JellyfishSDK/jellyfish at main and another checkout at defichain path, sets up Node.js 18, sets a build version using make.sh, builds and packages using docker, and runs tests with npm ci and npm run ci:test.
